# Snail

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Snail;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Snail { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
animal, insect, slow, speed, delicacy, spiral

## Categories
animals, food-beverage

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/snail)
